title: rubus rudis var. linguifolius
intro:
Rubus rudis var. linguifolius, also known as the "wild raspberry" or "linguifolius raspberry," is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rubus rudis species, a type of wild raspberry native to the mountainous regions of East Asia.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rudis var. linguifolius include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. 

The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
